creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
timur       2007-10-02 15:50:57 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Added files:
    misc/e2fsprogs-libblkid Makefile pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  A new slave port of the blkid library from the sysutils/e2fsprogs.
  
  PR:             ports/116231
  Submitted by:   Matthias Andree <matthias.andree@gmx.de> (maintainer)
  Approved by:    shaun (mentor)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1       +38 -0     ports/misc/e2fsprogs-libblkid/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/misc/e2fsprogs-libblkid/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/misc/e2fsprogs-libblkid/pkg-plist (new)
